work_unit: RE-SECRET-01 派生 fix: creds.js sqlite3 execSync→execFileSync + 空 catch 带 e.message
situation: audit-2026-07-05-017 deep audit of runner-exec (Windows Runner PowerShell exec+文件读写+凭证发现模块) 第 5/7 派生 fix (前 4: RE-CMDI-01 ff5cd06 / RE-EXEC-02 8be0bb6 / RE-EXEC-01 5cff148 / RE-MANIFEST-01 5bc02ab 已 merged). RE-SECRET-01 [MEDIUM, route-fix]: creds.js L29 getSessionToken 用 execSync(`sqlite3 "${dbPath}" "..."`) 经 shell 调 sqlite3, dbPath 在双引号上下文, HOME 受信任但若被设为含 " / $() / ` 的值可双引号注入; L14/L30 catch {} 静默吞错, sqlite3 真实失败(文件不存在/表不存在/权限)丢失成无上下文 throw, 排障困难。
action: creds.js 单文件 3 处改: (1) L5 require execSync→execFileSync; (2) L29 execSync(`sqlite3 "${dbPath}" "QUERY"`) → execFileSync('sqlite3', [dbPath, 'SELECT token FROM active_tokens ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;'], {encoding:'utf-8'}), 完全规避 shell, dbPath 作为 argv 直传不经过 shell 解析; (3) L14 catch {} → catch (e) { /* keep fallback to pgrep path; file read failure non-fatal */ } (保留 fallback 语义, getInternalSecret 文件读失败仍走 pgrep 路径); (4) L30 catch {} → catch (e) { throw new Error('无法获取 session token: ' + e.message); } (保留 throw 语义但带 e.message 排障). 不动 SERVER/WS_HOST(RE-CRED-01 下轮)、pgrep execSync(L16, 经 shell 但 pgrep 模式字符串硬编码无用户输入, 非注入面, 不在本 finding 范围)。
direction: route-fix (runner-exec 非 .claude/public-interfaces.txt 公共接口 → 复用同 security area worktree, stack 在 RE-MANIFEST-01 commit 5bc02ab 之上)
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh commit 复用 opt-security-1783266296 (route-fix, 非 direction-shift); wt HEAD=f2a6d83 'opt(security:runner-exec-secret): fix(runner-exec): RE-SECRET-01 audit...'; git show HEAD --stat: runner-exec/scripts/creds.js | 8 ++++---- 4 insertions 4 deletions; push origin auto/opt-security-1783266296 5bc02ab..f2a6d83 HEAD 成功 (Code Review 链接 https://code.alibaba-inc.com/qunbu/autonomous-studio/codereview/new?from=main&to=auto/opt-security-1783266296 已生成); wt creds.js L5=execFileSync/L14=catch(e){/*keep fallback*/}/L29=execFileSync('sqlite3',[dbPath,query])/L30=catch(e){throw...e.message} 已验证; node --check SYNTAX_OK; cp-guard 未跳过(creds.js 在 wt 与 main HEAD 一致, 无前轮未合并改动分歧, 正常 cp 通道). 派生路径与 case-001/002(RE-EXEC-01/MANIFEST-01)不同: 那两轮因目标文件已被前轮 commit 分歧触发 cp-guard 跳过→走 case-104 直编 wt 通道; 本轮 creds.js 首次改动无分歧→opt-worktree.sh 正常 cp 通道一次成功。
next_suggestion: 下轮派生 RE-CRED-01 [LOW, route-fix, creds.js L7-8 SERVER/WS_HOST 硬编码 127.0.0.1:58596 无 env 覆盖, precedent devix-automation-skill commit 2560c9b $CLOUDCLI_API_BASE_URL]: const BASE = process.env.CLOUDCLI_API_BASE_URL || 'http://127.0.0.1:58596'; SERVER=BASE; WS_HOST=BASE.replace(/^http/,'ws'). 与 RE-SECRET-01 同文件 creds.js 可继续 stack 在 opt-security-1783266296 (现 HEAD f2a6d83) 之上; 但注意 creds.js 现已分歧(RE-SECRET-01 已 commit 未 merge)→ cp-guard 将跳过→须走 case-104 直编 wt+wt 内 git commit 通道 (按 [[opt-worktree-stack-diverged-escape-hatch]]). 之后 RE-PATH-01 [LOW, push.js walkDir 跟随 symlink]: walkDir 加 entry.isSymbolicLink() 跳过 或 realpathSync 校验仍在 localDir 之下. 全部 3 pending merged|rejected 后 audit-cycle-state.status→cycle-complete 触发下一轮全量审计.

audit_findings.finding: RE-SECRET-01: getSessionToken 用 execSync(`sqlite3 "${dbPath}" "QUERY"`) 经 shell 调用, dbPath 在双引号上下文, HOME 若被设为含 " / $() / ` 的值可双引号注入; execFileSync 完全规避 shell 零成本
audit_findings.remediation: L29 改 execFileSync('sqlite3', [dbPath, 'SELECT token FROM active_tokens ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;'], {encoding:'utf-8'}); L5 require execSync→execFileSync

audit_findings.finding: RE-SECRET-01 (可观测性面): L14/L30 catch {} 静默吞错, sqlite3/auth.db 真实失败(文件不存在/表不存在/权限)丢失成无上下文 throw '无法获取 session token', 排障困难
audit_findings.remediation: L14 catch (e) { /* keep fallback */ } (保留 fallback 语义); L30 catch (e) { throw new Error('无法获取 session token: ' + e.message); } (带 e.message)
